pom.xml.general_idea: Switch compiler configuration from source/target to release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for modern JDKs; using 'release' ensures correct API and module path usage for Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok dependency version to support Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.
